01-basic-path.title: Basic Path
01-basic-path.description: A simple path navigation showing the current page location. Use this to help users understand their position in the site hierarchy.

02-custom-separator.title: Custom Separator
02-custom-separator.description: Pass any node via the separator prop to replace the default slash.

03-collapsed-breadcrumb.title: Collapsed Breadcrumb
03-collapsed-breadcrumb.description: Deep paths collapse intermediate crumbs into an ellipsis menu — Path.Item wraps the Menu trigger directly.
